# Clint Balbontin — Digital Marketing Specialist (Philippines)

> Digital marketing specialist based in the Philippines, working remotely with international clients since 2015. 300+ completed projects across 8+ industries in government, corporate, and non-profit sectors.

Website: https://clintbalbontin.com/
Email: clint@clintbalbontin.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/clinton-balbontin/
Location: Philippines (GMT+8), serving Australia, the UK, Europe, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia

## Services
- Social media strategy, content design, copywriting, and management
- Email marketing and CRM automation: GoHighLevel, Klaviyo, MailChimp; lifecycle flows (welcome, cart abandonment, win-back)
- Website design, landing pages, and sales funnels, built to convert and structured to rank
- SEO and analytics: GA4 and Google Tag Manager set up from day one
- Brand and creative: logo and brand identity, slide decks, print design, photography, video editing

## Experience
- 11+ years in digital marketing (since 2015)
- 300+ completed projects
- Industries: real estate, government, non-profit, corporate, education, tourism, MICE and events, property management
- Selected work: Makati Business Club annual reports, Philippine tourism campaigns, US luxury real estate websites and brand identities, wellness and e-commerce email programs

## How he works
- One specialist end to end: strategy, creative, build, launch, reporting
- Remote-first, replies within 24 hours
- Mornings overlap with Australian business hours, afternoons with the UK and Europe
